missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XVIII — outside the main entrance. Missable if you rush past.
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XIX — inside, room with forced fight, on a bed at the back. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE — Home is destroyed after this chapter.
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XX — three-way fork, RIGHT hallway, at the end. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE.
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXI — three-way fork, straight/left path. PERMANENTLY MISSABLE.

subLocations.name: Home Exterior
subLocations.prose: After meeting Cid, search the area outside Home before going in. Primer XVIII is right outside the main entrance on the ground — grab it immediately. Fiends swarm the area in waves as you push forward, so you won't get a quiet moment to backtrack.

subLocations.name: Home Interior
subLocations.prose: Three Primers are permanently missable once Home is destroyed — don't rush. Primer XIX is in the room where the forced fight occurs; check the bed at the back before engaging. At the three-way fork, go RIGHT down the northeast corridor for Primer XXI on the floor, then come back and take the left/straight path for Primer XX. The two Al Bhed puzzle chests in the inner rooms contain a Friend Sphere and a Skill Sphere — the correct answers are listed in the guide if you're short on Primers to translate them yourself.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XIX (room with forced fight, on a bed)
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XX (three-way fork, right hallway)
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXI (three-way fork, straight/left path)

bosses.strategy: Wendigo (18,000 HP) + 2 Guado Guardians (1,200 HP each). Kill both Guardians first — if Wendigo falls while they're alive, they revive it. Rikku's Use with Al Bhed Potions heals the whole party. Wendigo is weak to Fire. HP: 18,000.
